# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "myapp.fullname" . }}
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer   ## You can change this based on your environment (dev, staging or prod) to allow traffic from any hostnames for flexibility across different environments. Uncomment and customize accordingly if you want a specific service port number/type as per requirement in real production scenario.    
---   
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1  ## If the ingress controller supports this API version, uncomment & use it instead of v1 otherwise remove or comment out below lines  
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "myapp.fullname" . }}   
  annotations:           
     nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /$1         ## If you want to rewrite the URLs with ingress controller's host, uncomment and use it or remove if not needed  
spec:                     
    rules:                 
      - host: {{ .Values.ingress.host }}                     # Change this as per requirement (dev-env for dev environment etc.) Uncomment & customize accordingly based on your environments in production scenario like staging, prod 
        http:               
          paths:             
            - pathType: ImplementationSpecific    ## You can change to "Prefix" or other if you have a specific requirement (like /api/v1). Use this only when the ingress controller supports it  
             path: "/"                            # Change as per requirements, use '/' for root in dev and staging environment. For production env remove these lines   
               backend:               
                 serviceName: {{ include "myapp.service_name".fullname }}    
                 servicePort: 80                   # If your application is running on port different than default (like 433, change as per requirement)  
---                     
apiVersion: v1        
kind: Secret          
metadata:             
    name: {{ include "myapp.fullname" . }}-tls         
type: Opaque            ## If you want to use certificate for ingress then uncomment and provide tls secret key here  
data:                   
  tls.crt: {{ $key | b64enc }}    # You need a BASE64 of your private_certificate in real production scenario, replace it with the actual value if needed    
  tls.key: {{ $value | b64enc}}   ## Same as above but for key file (private certificate) also provide them and use their values here when you have certificates ready
